programs.title: Travel Thru History
programs.desc: Exploring Colorado's past through interactive attractions and first hand accounts.

programs.title: 5 Star Getaways
programs.desc: This series is a sun-filled invitation to travel and visit magnificent all-inclusive 5 star resorts throughout the world, their magnificent surroundings and the exciting excursions one can do at each destination.

programs.title: Facing Waves
programs.desc: Among the numerous islands and atolls of Papua New Guinea, Nikki Gregg experiences traditional festivals, charged canoe races and embarks on an exploratory trip down a remote river.

programs.title: Dream Purchase
programs.sub_title: In the Market for a Porsche
programs.desc: A guest realizes their dream of buying a Porsche.

programs.title: Road Less Traveled
programs.desc: Italy in the summer is as touristy as it gets...can Jonathan still find the road less traveled?

programs.title: Dream Cruises
programs.desc: Custom-built to navigate the Adriatic Sea and the Dalmatian Coast, the Belle de L'Adriatique sails along the Croatian coast; ports-of-call are Dubrovnik, Split, Hvar and Korcula.
